title: Midnight Flowers Canadian Stir-fry
description: A floral, gooey Canadian dish featuring sweet sherry with a touch of keto-friendly sweetness suitable for midnight cravings.

ingredients.name: Sweet sherry
ingredients.notes: To taste, reduce for a lower carb option

instructions: Heat olive oil in a non-stick pan over medium-high heat.
Add chopped kale to the pan, toss well with salt, and cook until wilted. Remove from heat.
In the same pan, add mushroom slices and stir-fry for about 5 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
Return kale to the pan with mushrooms. Add sweet sherry and balsamic vinegar, stir to combine. Cook for another minute.
Add shredded chicken to the pan along with a drizzle of olive oil if needed, and stir to coat evenly in the sauce.
Sprinkle sesame seeds over the top before serving hot.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
